inputs.label: Active cancer (treatment or palliation within 6 months)
inputs.businessContext: 1 point if active cancer (excluding skin cancers), else 0

label_i18n.en: Active cancer (treatment or palliation within 6 months)
label_i18n.tr: Aktif kanser (6 ay içinde tedavi veya palyasyon)
label_i18n.de: Aktive Krebserkrankung (Behandlung oder Palliation innerhalb von 6 Monaten)
label_i18n.fr: Cancer actif (traitement ou soins palliatifs dans les 6 mois)
label_i18n.es: Active cancer (treatment or palliation within 6 months)
label_i18n.ar: Active cancer (treatment or palliation within 6 months)

businessContext_i18n.en: 1 point if active cancer (excluding skin cancers), else 0
businessContext_i18n.tr: Aktif kanser varsa (cilt kanserleri hariç) 1 puan, yoksa 0
businessContext_i18n.de: 1 Punkt bei aktiver Krebserkrankung (außer Hautkrebs), sonst 0
businessContext_i18n.fr: 1 point si cancer actif (sauf cancers cutanés), sinon 0

inputs.label: Paralysis, paresis, or recent plaster immobilization of the lower extremity

label_i18n.en: Paralysis, paresis, or recent plaster immobilization of the lower extremity
label_i18n.tr: Alt ekstremitede felç, parezi veya yakın zamanda alçı immobilizasyonu
label_i18n.de: Lähmung, Parese oder kürzliche Gipsimmobilisierung der unteren Extremität
label_i18n.fr: Paralysie, parésie ou immobilisation récente par plâtre d'un membre inférieur
label_i18n.es: Paralysis, paresis, or recent plaster immobilization of the lower extremity
label_i18n.ar: Paralysis, paresis, or recent plaster immobilization of the lower extremity

inputs.label: Recently bedridden >3 days or major surgery within 4 weeks

label_i18n.en: Recently bedridden >3 days or major surgery within 4 weeks
label_i18n.tr: Son 4 hafta içinde >3 gün yatak istirahati veya büyük cerrahi
label_i18n.de: Kürzlich bettlägerig >3 Tage oder größere Operation innerhalb von 4 Wochen
label_i18n.fr: Alitement récent >3 jours ou chirurgie majeure dans les 4 semaines
label_i18n.es: Recently bedridden >3 days or major surgery within 4 weeks
label_i18n.ar: Recently bedridden >3 days or major surgery within 4 weeks

inputs.label: Localized tenderness along the distribution of the deep veins
inputs.businessContext: 1 point if present (e.g., calf, thigh, popliteal fossa), else 0

label_i18n.en: Localized tenderness along the distribution of the deep veins
label_i18n.de: Lokalisierte Druckempfindlichkeit entlang der tiefen Venen
label_i18n.fr: Sensibilité localisée le long du trajet des veines profondes
label_i18n.es: Localized tenderness along the distribution of the deep veins
label_i18n.ar: Localized tenderness along the distribution of the deep veins

businessContext_i18n.en: 1 point if present (e.g., calf, thigh, popliteal fossa), else 0
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mevcut ise (örn. baldır, uyluk, popliteal fossa) 1 puan, değilse 0
businessContext_i18n.de: 1 Punkt wenn vorhanden (z.B. Wade, Oberschenkel, Kniekehle), sonst 0
businessContext_i18n.fr: 1 point si présent (ex. mollet, cuisse, creux poplité), sinon 0

inputs.label: Entire leg swollen
inputs.businessContext: 1 point if the whole leg is swollen compared to the asymptomatic side, else 0

businessContext_i18n.en: 1 point if the whole leg is swollen compared to the asymptomatic side, else 0
businessContext_i18n.tr: Asemptomatik tarafa kıyasla tüm bacak şişmişse 1 puan, değilse 0
businessContext_i18n.de: 1 Punkt wenn das gesamte Bein im Vergleich zur asymptomatischen Seite geschwollen ist, sonst 0
businessContext_i18n.fr: 1 point si toute la jambe est enflée par rapport au côté asymptomatique, sinon 0

inputs.label: Calf swelling >3 cm compared to asymptomatic leg
inputs.businessContext: 1 point if measured difference is >3 cm at 10 cm below tibial tuberosity, else 0

label_i18n.en: Calf swelling >3 cm compared to asymptomatic leg
label_i18n.tr: Asemptomatik bacağa göre >3 cm baldır şişliği
label_i18n.de: Wadenschwellung >3 cm im Vergleich zum asymptomatischen Bein
label_i18n.fr: Œdème du mollet >3 cm par rapport à la jambe asymptomatique
label_i18n.es: Calf swelling >3 cm compared to asymptomatic leg
label_i18n.ar: Calf swelling >3 cm compared to asymptomatic leg

businessContext_i18n.en: 1 point if measured difference is >3 cm at 10 cm below tibial tuberosity, else 0
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ölçülen fark tibial tüberkülün 10 cm altında >3 cm ise 1 puan, değilse 0
businessContext_i18n.de: 1 Punkt, wenn die gemessene Differenz >3 cm bei 10 cm unterhalb der Tuberositas tibiae beträgt, sonst 0
businessContext_i18n.fr: 1 point si la différence mesurée est >3 cm à 10 cm sous la tubérosité tibiale, sinon 0

inputs.label: Pitting edema confined to the symptomatic leg
inputs.businessContext: 1 point if edema is greater in the symptomatic leg, else 0

label_i18n.en: Pitting edema confined to the symptomatic leg
label_i18n.de: Pitting-Ödem, beschränkt auf das symptomatische Bein
label_i18n.fr: Œdème prenant le godet limité à la jambe symptomatique
label_i18n.es: Pitting edema confined to the symptomatic leg
label_i18n.ar: Pitting edema confined to the symptomatic leg

businessContext_i18n.en: 1 point if edema is greater in the symptomatic leg, else 0
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ödem semptomatik bacakta daha fazla ise 1 puan, değilse 0
businessContext_i18n.de: 1 Punkt, wenn das Ödem im symptomatischen Bein stärker ist, sonst 0
businessContext_i18n.fr: 1 point si l'œdème est plus important dans la jambe symptomatique, sinon 0

inputs.label: Alternative diagnosis as likely or more likely than DVT
inputs.businessContext: If alternative diagnosis is at least as plausible, subtract 2 points (enter -2); else 0

label_i18n.en: Alternative diagnosis as likely or more likely than DVT
label_i18n.tr: DVT'den daha olası veya eşit olasılıkta alternatif tanı
label_i18n.de: Alternative Diagnose als wahrscheinlich oder wahrscheinlicher als TVT
label_i18n.fr: Diagnostic alternatif aussi probable ou plus probable que la TVP
label_i18n.es: Alternative diagnosis as likely or more likely than DVT
label_i18n.ar: Alternative diagnosis as likely or more likely than DVT

businessContext_i18n.en: If alternative diagnosis is at least as plausible, subtract 2 points (enter -2); else 0
businessContext_i18n.tr: Alternatif tanı en az eşit olasılıkta ise 2 puan çıkarın (-2 girin); değilse 0
businessContext_i18n.de: Wenn eine alternative Diagnose mindestens so plausibel ist, 2 Punkte abziehen (geben Sie -2 ein); sonst 0
businessContext_i18n.fr: Si un diagnostic alternatif est au moins aussi plausible, soustrayez 2 points (entrez -2) ; sinon 0

formulas.totalScore: activeCancer + paralysis + surgeryOrBedridden + tendernessAlongVeins + entireLegSwollen + calfSwellingOver3cm + pittingEdema + alternativeDiagnosis
formulas.totalScore_aux: activeCancer + paralysis + surgeryOrBedridden + tendernessAlongVeins + entireLegSwollen + calfSwellingOver3cm + pittingEdema + alternativeDiagnosis

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
